title: Company Manners
content:
When Bess gave her Dollies a Tea, said she, - 
     "It's unpolite, when they's Company,
     To say you've drinked two cups, you see, - 
     But say you've drinked a couple of tea."
meaning:
"Company Manners" is a quintessential example of James Whitcomb Riley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
